scopes.tasks:write: Write access to the Hubstaff Tasks API
scopes.tasks:read: Read access to the Hubstaff Tasks API

tags.name: checklists
tags.description: View task checklists and their items

tags.name: comments
tags.description: Add comments and discussions to tasks

tags.name: labels
tags.description: Categorize and filter tasks with color-coded labels

tags.name: lists
tags.description: Organize tasks into lists within projects

tags.name: members
tags.description: View organization members and their roles

tags.name: projects
tags.description: Create and manage projects for task organization

tags.name: tasks
tags.description: Create, update, and track tasks with assignments and due dates

get.description: Returns the checklist with the given ID.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description: Returns a collection of items for the given checklist.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description: Returns a collection of folders.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description: Returns the folder with the given ID.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description:
Returns a collection of projects for the given folder.

Results can be filtered by status (active/archived).

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

post.description:
Creates a new project within the given folder.

Returns the created project.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description: Returns the list with the given ID.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description:
Returns a collection of tasks for the given list.

Results can be filtered by assignee (all/assigned/unassigned) and updated[start]/updated[stop] time range.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

post.description:
Creates a new task in the given list.

Returns the created task.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated member.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description: Returns the member with the given ID.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description: Returns a collection of organizations accessible to the current user.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description: Returns the organization with the given ID.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description: Returns a collection of folders for the given organization.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

post.description:
Creates a new folder for the given organization.

Returns the created folder.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description: Returns a collection of members for the given organization.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description:
Returns a collection of projects for the given organization.

Results can be filtered by status (active/archived).

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description:
Returns a collection of all projects accessible to the current user.

Results can be filtered by status (active/archived).

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description: Returns the project with the given ID.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description: Returns a collection of labels for the given project.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

post.description:
Creates a new label for the given project.

Returns the created label.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description:
Returns a collection of lists for the given project.

Use removed=true to include removed lists.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

post.description:
Creates a new list for the given project.

Returns the created list.

Available types: normal (default), done.

parameters.name: list[position]
parameters.description: The list position. Default is to add as the last list.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description: Returns a collection of members for the given project.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description:
Returns a collection of tasks for the given project.

Results can be filtered by assignee (all/assigned/unassigned) and updated[start]/updated[stop] time range.

parameters.name: assignee
parameters.description: Whether to only include assigned tasks

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description:
Returns a collection of tasks assigned to the current user.

Use removed=true to include removed tasks.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description: Returns the task with the given ID.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

patch.description:
Updates a task.

Returns the updated task.

Only pass in the fields you want to change.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

patch.description:
Marks a task as complete by moving it to the Done list.

Returns the completed task.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description: Returns a collection of attachments for the given task.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description: Returns a collection of checklists for the given task.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description: Returns a collection of comments for the given task.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

post.description:
Creates a new comment for the given task.

Returns the created comment.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

get.description: Returns a collection of time entries for the given task.

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan

post.description:
Creates a new time entry for the given task.

Returns the created time entry.

Time must be specified as ISO 8601 timestamps (started_at and stopped_at).

403.description: API access is only for organizations on an active plan
